scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @jinmarket/shared && npm run build --workspace @jinmarket/db && npm run build --workspace @jinmarket/server && npm run build --workspace @jinmarket/api && npm run build --workspace @jinmarket/shop-web && npm run build --workspace @jinmarket/admin-web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @jinmarket/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @jinmarket/db && npm run typecheck --workspace @jinmarket/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @jinmarket/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @jinmarket/shop-web && npm run typecheck --workspace @jinmarket/admin-web
